markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review content strategy corrections and recent traffic performance.](https://fathom.video/share/pmc6MXXQQ2xg-Ne5s-EV3X4sq4jyan5e?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Strategy Corrected:** A new workflow fixed two issues: over-focus on identity and false product claims. It uses simpler instructions and validates all Aembit-specific claims against the live website.](https://fathom.video/share/pmc6MXXQQ2xg-Ne5s-EV3X4sq4jyan5e?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)
  - [**14 Articles Revised:** The first batch of 14 articles (from 25 total) is ready for review. Aembit will prioritize reviewing outlines first to validate the new process before the remaining 11 articles are revised.](https://fathom.video/share/pmc6MXXQQ2xg-Ne5s-EV3X4sq4jyan5e?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
  - [**Traffic Driven by Technical Content:** Blog traffic increased significantly (views: 400s→515; users: 200s→350), driven by highly technical how-to articles like "MCP auth" and "replacing a GitHub personal access token."](https://fathom.video/share/pmc6MXXQQ2xg-Ne5s-EV3X4sq4jyan5e?tab=summary&timestamp=698.0)
  - [**New Source Material for AI & MCP:** Two interview recordings from CEO David and Apoorva will be transcribed to provide new source material, enriching content on agentic AI security and MCP.](https://fathom.video/share/pmc6MXXQQ2xg-Ne5s-EV3X4sq4jyan5e?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Correction

  - [**Problem:** The previous workflow produced content with two issues:](https://fathom.video/share/pmc6MXXQQ2xg-Ne5s-EV3X4sq4jyan5e?tab=summary&timestamp=303.0)
      - [An over-focus on identity federation.](https://fathom.video/share/pmc6MXXQQ2xg-Ne5s-EV3X4sq4jyan5e?tab=summary&timestamp=303.0)
      - [False or unverified claims about Aembit's capabilities.](https://fathom.video/share/pmc6MXXQQ2xg-Ne5s-EV3X4sq4jyan5e?tab=summary&timestamp=303.0)
  - [**Root Cause:** The source artifacts (writing guidelines, product docs) were overly focused on identity.](https://fathom.video/share/pmc6MXXQQ2xg-Ne5s-EV3X4sq4jyan5e?tab=summary&timestamp=324.0)
  - [**Solution:** Two new artifacts now guide content creation:](https://fathom.video/share/pmc6MXXQQ2xg-Ne5s-EV3X4sq4jyan5e?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
    1.  [**Writing Instructions:** Simpler guidelines with tone examples and specific conventions (e.g., no em dashes, MISI framework compliance).](https://fathom.video/share/pmc6MXXQQ2xg-Ne5s-EV3X4sq4jyan5e?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
    2.  [**Aembit POV Document:** A consolidated source of truth on Aembit's security stance, built from past webinar articles.](https://fathom.video/share/pmc6MXXQQ2xg-Ne5s-EV3X4sq4jyan5e?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)
  - [**Validation Step:** The workflow now searches `aembit.io` for every Aembit-specific claim. If a claim is not found on the live site, it is removed from the draft.](https://fathom.video/share/pmc6MXXQQ2xg-Ne5s-EV3X4sq4jyan5e?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [**Alternative:** Kyle suggested an alternative using GrowthX's "Atlas" knowledge base to feed the engine with a curated set of source documents.](https://fathom.video/share/pmc6MXXQQ2xg-Ne5s-EV3X4sq4jyan5e?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)

### Content Revision & Review

  - [**Status:** 14 of 25 articles have been revised using the new workflow and are ready for review.](https://fathom.video/share/pmc6MXXQQ2xg-Ne5s-EV3X4sq4jyan5e?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
      - [This batch includes most MCP-related content.](https://fathom.video/share/pmc6MXXQQ2xg-Ne5s-EV3X4sq4jyan5e?tab=summary&timestamp=637.0)
      - [The remaining 11 articles will be revised after Aembit validates the new process.](https://fathom.video/share/pmc6MXXQQ2xg-Ne5s-EV3X4sq4jyan5e?tab=summary&timestamp=605.0)
  - [**Aembit Review Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/pmc6MXXQQ2xg-Ne5s-EV3X4sq4jyan5e?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
      - [**Priority:** Review outlines first, as they are shorter and allow for faster validation of the new process.](https://fathom.video/share/pmc6MXXQQ2xg-Ne5s-EV3X4sq4jyan5e?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)
      - [**Goal:** Ashur will review 5+ articles today.](https://fathom.video/share/pmc6MXXQQ2xg-Ne5s-EV3X4sq4jyan5e?tab=summary&timestamp=1034.0)

### Performance & New Source Material

  - [**Blog Traffic:**](https://fathom.video/share/pmc6MXXQQ2xg-Ne5s-EV3X4sq4jyan5e?tab=summary&timestamp=698.0)
      - [Views: 400s → 515](https://fathom.video/share/pmc6MXXQQ2xg-Ne5s-EV3X4sq4jyan5e?tab=summary&timestamp=698.0)
      - [Active Users: mid-200s → 350](https://fathom.video/share/pmc6MXXQQ2xg-Ne5s-EV3X4sq4jyan5e?tab=summary&timestamp=698.0)
      - [**Driver:** Highly technical how-to articles.](https://fathom.video/share/pmc6MXXQQ2xg-Ne5s-EV3X4sq4jyan5e?tab=summary&timestamp=698.0)
  - [**GrowthX Articles:**](https://fathom.video/share/pmc6MXXQQ2xg-Ne5s-EV3X4sq4jyan5e?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
      - [Small sample sizes (3–5 sessions) make performance analysis difficult.](https://fathom.video/share/pmc6MXXQQ2xg-Ne5s-EV3X4sq4jyan5e?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
      - ["Secretless access for GitHub actions" & "Dynamic authorization and static secrets" saw 100–200% session increases.](https://fathom.video/share/pmc6MXXQQ2xg-Ne5s-EV3X4sq4jyan5e?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
      - ["Securing AI agents and LLM workflows" saw a session decrease.](https://fathom.video/share/pmc6MXXQQ2xg-Ne5s-EV3X4sq4jyan5e?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
  - [**New Source Material:** Dan provided links to two interview recordings to enrich content on key topics.](https://fathom.video/share/pmc6MXXQQ2xg-Ne5s-EV3X4sq4jyan5e?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)
      - [**David (CEO) Interview:** Focuses on agentic AI security.](https://fathom.video/share/pmc6MXXQQ2xg-Ne5s-EV3X4sq4jyan5e?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)
      - [**Apoorva Interview:** Focuses on MCP.](https://fathom.video/share/pmc6MXXQQ2xg-Ne5s-EV3X4sq4jyan5e?tab=summary&timestamp=935.0)

### Glossary & Website Update

  - [**Glossary:** Two glossary pages are ready for review.](https://fathom.video/share/pmc6MXXQQ2xg-Ne5s-EV3X4sq4jyan5e?tab=summary&timestamp=806.0)
      - [**Priority Shift:** Aembit requested fast-tracking AI-related glossary items.](https://fathom.video/share/pmc6MXXQQ2xg-Ne5s-EV3X4sq4jyan5e?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)
      - [**Strategy:** GrowthX will prioritize items that meet Aembit's criteria and have high search volume.](https://fathom.video/share/pmc6MXXQQ2xg-Ne5s-EV3X4sq4jyan5e?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)
  - [**Website:** The new glossary page design is nearly complete.](https://fathom.video/share/pmc6MXXQQ2xg-Ne5s-EV3X4sq4jyan5e?tab=summary&timestamp=1065.0)
      - [**Action:** Dan will send the two sample glossary pages to the web dev team for integration.](https://fathom.video/share/pmc6MXXQQ2xg-Ne5s-EV3X4sq4jyan5e?tab=summary&timestamp=1065.0)
      - [**Vision:** The live glossary will link directly to the full definition pages as they are published.](https://fathom.video/share/pmc6MXXQQ2xg-Ne5s-EV3X4sq4jyan5e?tab=summary&timestamp=1115.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Aembit:**](https://fathom.video/share/pmc6MXXQQ2xg-Ne5s-EV3X4sq4jyan5e?tab=summary&timestamp=1023.0)
      - [Review the 14 revised articles (outlines first); Ashur to review 5+ today.](https://fathom.video/share/pmc6MXXQQ2xg-Ne5s-EV3X4sq4jyan5e?tab=summary&timestamp=1034.0)
      - [Send the two sample glossary pages to the web dev team.](https://fathom.video/share/pmc6MXXQQ2xg-Ne5s-EV3X4sq4jyan5e?tab=summary&timestamp=1065.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/pmc6MXXQQ2xg-Ne5s-EV3X4sq4jyan5e?tab=summary&timestamp=982.0)
      - [Transcribe the David and Apoorva interview recordings for new source material.](https://fathom.video/share/pmc6MXXQQ2xg-Ne5s-EV3X4sq4jyan5e?tab=summary&timestamp=982.0)
      - [Prioritize AI-related glossary items for development.](https://fathom.video/share/pmc6MXXQQ2xg-Ne5s-EV3X4sq4jyan5e?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)
